name: The League of Uniform Nomenclature Strikes
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>同</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>姓</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>同</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>名</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>同</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>盟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>罷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>業</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 face-up monster you control; equip 2 monsters with the same original name as that target from your hand, Deck, and/or GY to that target as Equip Spells, and if you do, it cannot attack or be destroyed by battle while equipped with those 2 cards. You cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, except monsters with the same original Type as the targeted monster. You can only activate 1 "The League of Uniform Nomenclature Strikes" per turn.
eff: Target 1 face-up monster you control; equip 2 monsters with the same original name as that target from your hand, Deck, and/or GY to that target as Equip Spells, and if you do, it cannot attack or be destroyed by battle while equipped with those 2 cards. You cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, except monsters with the same original Type as the targeted monster. You can only activate 1 "The League of Uniform Nomenclature Strikes" per turn.

action: Equips monsters from the player's hand
Equips monsters from the player's Deck
Equips monsters from the player's Graveyard
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
